name: noobit
description: Opinionated .NET 10+ / ASP.NET Core + Angular full-stack standards: FusionCache+Redis, EF Core/Dapper, RabbitMQ, cookie-BFF security, Docker/nginx/Let's Encrypt, xUnit v3 + Testcontainers, Vitest + Playwright, docs-as-code with Mermaid — plus automated review, test, docs agents and quality-gate hooks.
